confidence_notes: Attack pattern consistent with flash loan price manipulation of Uniswap V3 pool. Two newly deployed unverified attacker contracts orchestrate the attack. SwapRouter facilitates flash loan. Victim UniswapV3Pool shows net-negative token transfer. Additional protocols (Balancer, Aave) involved in multi-hop flow. Exact loss amount and manipulation mechanism require trace-level analysis of the unverified attacker contracts.
